ops.title: P4 (rescoped): adopt athome.research as the experiment harness — no native experiment.toml/budget.py

ops.description: Rescoped 2026-07-16 per the approved ai-trains-ai adoption plan (plans/lets-see-what-we-synchronous-cookie.md): the declarative harness = `athome.research` ExperimentSpec TOML (metric_command/mutable_paths/budget with max_units+max_wall_s+max_usd), and LLM-boundary budget enforcement = athome's spend machinery (SpendClearance for judge spend; ExperimentSpec.budget.max_usd for experiment spend). Native `experiment.toml` runner, `budget.py`, and `backlog.py` are explicitly NOT built. Delivery vehicle: C0 (deps: experiment-at-home[research,llm,train]>=0.4,<0.5 + spawnllm >=0.6.1,<0.7) and C4 (first spec at experiments/watcher-base-sweep.toml wrapping a new `--score-only` retrain lane that writes via athome.train.write_metric).
